title: Sets: unique things
body: A *set* is a collection with no duplicates and no order: `{1, 2, 3}`. Turn a list into a set with `set(lst)` to drop duplicates instantly. Sets do fast membership checks (`x in s`) and set math: `a & b` (in both), `a | b` (in either), `a - b` (in a but not b). Reach for a set whenever the question is about 'unique' or 'overlap'.
